content: Create a REST API with user authentication and JWT tokens
Breaking down the task: need /register, /login, and /refresh endpoints. Will use FastAPI, python-jose for JWT, and bcrypt for password hashing.
Found: FastAPI security utilities with OAuth2PasswordBearer, python-jose for JWT encoding, passlib[bcrypt] for password hashing. Recommend HS256 algorithm.
Research complete. FastAPI + python-jose + bcrypt is the recommended stack. JWT expiry should be 30 minutes for access tokens, 7 days for refresh tokens.
write_file(path='app/models/user.py', content='SQLAlchemy User model with hashed_password field')
Created app/models/user.py — User model with id, email, hashed_password, is_active fields.
write_file(path='app/auth/jwt.py', content='JWT encode/decode helpers using python-jose')
Created app/auth/jwt.py — create_access_token(), create_refresh_token(), decode_token() implemented.
Created app/routers/auth.py — POST /register, POST /login, POST /refresh endpoints wired up.
Code review flagged: /register endpoint missing email format validation and rate limiting. /login returns 200 on failed auth instead of 401.
edit_file(path='app/routers/auth.py', change='Add Pydantic email validation, HTTPException 401 on bad credentials, SlowAPI rate limiting')
Updated app/routers/auth.py — email validation, 401 response codes, and rate limiting (5 req/min on /login) applied.
All tests passing — 18 passed, 0 failed. Coverage: 96%. All edge cases covered including expired tokens and duplicate registration.
Added OpenAPI descriptions to all endpoints and updated README with authentication flow diagram and example curl commands.
REST API with JWT authentication complete. 3 endpoints live, 18 tests passing at 96% coverage, docs updated.
